news.t: ETF issuers defied investor expectations by raising fees in 2023. They may have to keep doing it.
American Beacon Advisors Bolsters ETF Offerings With New Natural Resources Fund

holdings.infoBox: MGNR is an equity ETF with a total of 49 individual holdings. The top holdings are Hudbay Minerals stock at 4.32%, Teck Resources at 4.19%, ArcelorMittal at 4.16%, Smurfit Westrock at 4.03%, and Alcoa at 3.87%.

overview.description: The American Beacon GLG Natural Resources ETF (MGNR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is actively managed, seeking long-term capital appreciation through investments in a narrow portfolio of global stocks that are predominantly involved in natural resources and related businesses. MGNR was launched on Feb 5, 2024 and is issued by American Beacon.

data.title: ETF issuers defied investor expectations by raising fees in 2023. They may have to keep doing it.
data.text: Hello! This is MarketWatch reporter Isabel Wang bringing you this week's ETF Wrap. After a decade of seemingly never-ending fee-cutting wars, ETF issuers raised their fees in 2023 as the landscape evo...

data.title: American Beacon Advisors Bolsters ETF Offerings With New Natural Resources Fund
data.text: IRVING, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)--American Beacon Advisors, Inc. announced the launch of its second exchange-traded fund, the American Beacon GLG Natural Resources ETF (Ticker: MGNR).
